memoryArtifacts.headline: Page 627. Bulkeley of Cheadle-Bulkeley and Beaumaris. Vol III, 1882. George Omerod
memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 627. Vol III. 1882
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.  
In 3 Volumes, Volume III,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages
Second Edition, 1882 
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lawrence de Warrene於1394年出生在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利時，他的父親Nicholas de Warrene21歲，母親Agnes Wynnington27歲。他於大約1402年與Lady Margery de Bulkeley在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1444年3月14日在英國爾波易頓享年50歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lawrence de Warrene于1394年出生在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利时，他的父亲Nicholas de Warrene21岁，母亲Agnes Wynnington27岁。他于大约1402年与Lady Margery de Bulkeley在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1444年3月14日在英国爾波易頓享年50岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warrene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Warren
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence de Warrene was born in 1394, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Warrene, was 21 and his mother, Agnes Wynnington, was 27. He married Lady Margery de Bulkeley about 1402, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 14 March 1444, in Poynton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lawrence de Warrene est né en 1394, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Warrene, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wynnington, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margery de Bulkeley environ 1402, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 14 mars 1444, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Poynton-with-Worth, Cheshire East, Engla: Cheshire East, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lawrence de Warrene 1394 in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Warrene 21 und seine Mutter Agnes Wynnington 27. Er hat um 1402 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Margery de Bulkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 14. März 1444 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Poynton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Margery de Bulkeley circa 1402, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 14 marzo 1444, nel Poynton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence de Warreneが1394年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Warreneは21歳，母Agnes Wynningtonは27歳であった。約1402年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでLady Margery de Bulkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1444年3月14日にイギリスチェシュアイアポイントンで50歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence de Warrene(이)가 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 플레스트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Warrene(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Wynnington(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Lady Margery de Bulkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1444년 3월 14일 영국 체실르 포이턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.Poynton-with-Worth, Cheshire East, Engla: Cheshire East, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence de Warrene nasceu em 1394, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Warrene, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wynnington, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margery de Bulkeley aproximadamente 1402, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de março de 1444, em Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Poynton-with-Worth, Cheshire East, Engla: Cheshire East, Cheshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lawrence de Warrene родился в 1394 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Warrene было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wynnington, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margery de Bulkeley около 1402 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 14 марта 1444 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Margery de Bulkeley aproximadamente 1402, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1444, en Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
